request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about What We Will Learn. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Acids, Bases and Salts. Must show visually: Define acids and bases based on sensory properties.; List natural sources of common acids and bases.; Identify the color changes of litmus, turmeric, and phenolphthalein in acidic/basic solutions.; Explain why indicators are used instead of tasting chemicals.. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for What We Will Learn that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains learning_outcomes.. Teaching context: Share the learning outcomes clearly.. Student takeaway: Know what they should learn by the end of class.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infogr...
